flashcards.back:
1. Inception - business case, scope
2. Elaboration - architecture, requirements
3. Construction - build the system
4. Transition - deploy to users

Remember: I-E-C-T

- Use-Case Driven
- Architecture-Centric
- Iterative and Incremental
- Risk-Focused

Uses UML for modeling

PSP0: Baseline (basic process)
PSP1: Planning (estimation)
PSP2: Quality (reviews)
PSP3: Cyclic (large programs)

Developed by Watts Humphrey
